versions.changelog_entry: Phase 17 initial prompt: AI-direction concordance + volume-ramp diagnostic columns added to the §11.3 finding-strength table without changing existing FindingStrength semantics. Lands AI_TYPICAL_DIRECTION priors registry, DirectionConcordance and VolumeRampFlag enums, classify_direction_concordance and compute_volume_ramp_flag library functions, notebook §11.3.1 markdown explaining the diagnostic, and a pre-reg lock recommendation. Motivated by Apr 27 2026 review showing 8 MODERATE authors with anti-AI direction + 12x-276x volume ramps confounding the classifier verdict.
